product_results.title: JETech Screen Protector for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3-Inch with Camera Lens Protector, Easy Installation Tool, Tempered Glass Film, HD Clear, 2-Pack Each

summary.text: Customers find this screen protector to be of good quality and easy to install. The protector fits correctly and works well, providing effective screen protection. However, some customers experience issues with adhesion, while opinions on durability and bubble-free installation vary among users.

authors_reviews.title: Great Value & Easy to Apply
authors_reviews.text: I’ve been using the JETech screen protector for my iPhone 13 Pro for a week now, and I’m really impressed with it. The installation was a breeze, no bubbles or hassle. It comes with everything you need, including a handy alignment frame, and pretty of instructions to follow if this is your first time. It’s one of the easiest screen protectors I’ve ever applied.The clarity and touch sensitivity are spot on. I haven’t noticed any difference in screen response compared to not having a protector on at all. Plus, the camera lens protector is a nice touch. I’m always worried about scratching my camera lens, but this feels like it adds that extra layer of protection without affecting photo quality.
authors_reviews.author: Ryan

authors_reviews.title: Good quality and reliable protection.
authors_reviews.text: Have been using JETech for many devices over the years. Super easy to apply and 90% bubble free on first application while being very easy to smooth out. Can’t even tell there’s a screen protector on the iPhone when all is said and done.
authors_reviews.author: Stephen A.

authors_reviews.title: Solidecet facile
authors_reviews.text: Excellent! Facile a installer et super protection!
authors_reviews.author: André

authors_reviews.title: Très bon choix
authors_reviews.text: Facile à appliquer avec de bonnes informations sur la façon de procéder.
authors_reviews.author: Mars Duguay

authors_reviews.title: Saved my brand new iPhone 17!
authors_reviews.text: My iphone 17 managed to vibrate itself off my nightstand and the corner cracked even though I had a Velvet Caviar phone case on. The screen protector cracked but my phone screen did not!I’m so impressed and buying another one because I managed to get an eyelash stuck under the center of the second one. That was my fault.I highly recommend this item!!!
authors_reviews.author: Laine

authors_reviews.title: good product
authors_reviews.text: worked great for easy installation. has been on for more then a year and no issues
authors_reviews.author: Adam Silva

authors_reviews.title: Saved my phones more than once
authors_reviews.text: improved - used these for 4 years on wife's and my i phone 13 and have changed them at least twice screen protector cracked- screen did not! Original was 3 pack with tape to center it was awkward. The new two pack includes a border to install and the protector centers easily. I always keep a spare pack and highly recommend, does not interfere with either case we use.
authors_reviews.author: Jim biddle

authors_reviews.title: Great product.
authors_reviews.text: Great quality and quick delivery. Not the easiest install that I have experiance but forgiving if things are a little off so it working wonderfully.
authors_reviews.author: S Francis K
